title: oplismenus crus-galli var. colonum
intro: Oplismenus crus-galli var. colonum, also known as false barley or witch grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oplismenus crus-galli var. colonum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used as a poultice to apply topically to affected areas.
